017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.IoUtils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
023
024import java.io.*;
025import java.time.*;
026import java.time.temporal.*;
027import java.util.*;
028import java.util.function.*;
029
030import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
034
035/**
036 * Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of {@link CborSerializer}.
037 *
038 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
039 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.
040 * </ul>
041 *
042 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
043 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/CborBasics">CBOR Basics</a>
044 * </ul>
045 */
046@SuppressWarnings({
047   "resource",   // Output streams managed by calling code
048   "java:S110",  // Inheritance depth acceptable for serializer session hierarchy
049   "java:S115"   // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention (e.g., CONST_value)
050})
051public class CborSerializerSession extends OutputStreamSerializerSession implements TokenWritable, ArrayRecordWritable {
052
053   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
054   private static final String ARG_ctx = "ctx";
055
056   /**
057    * Builder class.
058    */
059   public static class Builder extends OutputStreamSerializerSession.Builder<Builder> {
060
061      /**
062       * Constructor
063       *
064       * @param ctx The context creating this session.
065       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
066       */
067      protected Builder(CborSerializer ctx) {
068         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
069      }
070
071      @Override
072      public CborSerializerSession build() {
073         return new CborSerializerSession(this);
074      }
075
076   }
077
078   private static class SimpleMapEntry {
079      final Object key;
080      final Object value;
081
082      SimpleMapEntry(Object key, Object value) {
083         this.key = key;
084         this.value = value;
085      }
086   }
087
088   /**
089    * Creates a new builder for this object.
090    *
091    * @param ctx The context creating this session.
092    *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
093    * @return A new builder.
094    */
095   public static Builder create(CborSerializer ctx) {
096      return new Builder(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
097   }
098
099   /*
100    * Converts the specified output target object to an {@link CborOutputStream}.
101    */
102   private static CborOutputStream getCborOutputStream(SerializerPipe out) throws IOException {
103      Object output = out.getRawOutput();
104      if (output instanceof CborOutputStream output2)
105         return output2;
106      var os = new CborOutputStream(out.getOutputStream());
107      out.setOutputStream(os);
108      return os;
109   }
110
111   /**
112    * Constructor.
113    *
114    * @param builder The builder for this object.
115    */
116   protected CborSerializerSession(Builder builder) {
117      super(builder);
118   }
119
120   /**
121    * Opens a low-level push generator that emits CBOR (RFC 8949) one structural event at a time,
122    * bound to this live session.
123    *
124    * <p>
125    * Containers ({@code startObject} / {@code startArray}) are emitted as CBOR
126    * <b>indefinite-length</b> markers (<c>0xBF</c> / <c>0x9F</c>) so the caller doesn't have to
127    * know element counts up front; matching {@code endXxx} calls emit the BREAK byte
128    * (<c>0xFF</c>).  Resulting bytes are valid RFC-8949 CBOR.
129    *
130    * <h5 class='section'>Builder properties honored:</h5>
131    * Databind-level settings flow through to {@link TokenWriter#object(Object) object(Object)}:
132    * <c>keepNullProperties</c>, <c>trimEmptyMaps</c>, <c>trimEmptyCollections</c>,
133    * <c>sortMaps</c>, <c>sortCollections</c>, <c>trimStrings</c>.
134    *
135    * <h5 class='section'>Builder properties NOT honored:</h5>
136    * <c>useWhitespace</c>, <c>maxIndent</c>, <c>quoteChar</c>, <c>escapeSolidus</c> (binary
137    * format &mdash; no text-formatting concepts apply); <c>uriContext</c>,
138    * <c>uriResolution</c>, <c>uriRelativity</c>, <c>listener</c>.
139    *
140    * @param output The output.  Accepts {@link OutputStream} or {@link File}.
141    * @return A new {@link CborTokenWriter}.
142    * @throws IOException If the output type is not supported or could not be opened.
143    */
144   @Override /* TokenWritable */
145   public TokenWriter serializeTokens(Object output) throws IOException {
146      var walk = new PojoWalker.Options(
147         isKeepNullProperties(),
148         isTrimEmptyMaps(),
149         isTrimEmptyCollections(),
150         isSortMaps(),
151         isSortCollections(),
152         isTrimStrings(),
153         getMarshallingContext());
154      return CborTokenWriter.forOutput(output, new CborTokenWriter.Settings(walk));
155   }
156
157   /**
158    * Streaming array-element {@link RecordWriter} backed by {@link CborTokenWriter}.
159    * Memory is O(1) &mdash; CBOR's writer always uses indefinite-length arrays
160    * (0x9F .. 0xFF) so element count is not required up front.
161    *
162    * @param output The output.
163    * @return A new element-streamed {@link RecordWriter}.
164    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying output.
165    */
166   @Override /* ArrayRecordWritable */
167   public RecordWriter serializeArrayRecords(Object output) throws IOException {
168      return StreamingArrayRecord.writer(serializeTokens(output));
169   }
170
171   /*
172    * Workhorse method.
173    * Determines the type of object, and then calls the appropriate type-specific serialization method.
174    */
175   @SuppressWarnings({
176      "rawtypes",   // Raw types necessary for generic type handling
177      "java:S3776"  // Cognitive complexity acceptable for serialization dispatch logic
178   })
179   private CborOutputStream serializeAnything(CborOutputStream out, Object o, ClassMeta<?> eType, String attrName, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws SerializeException {
180
181      if (o == null)
182         return out.appendNull();
183
184      if (eType == null)
185         eType = object();
186
187      ClassMeta<?> aType = null;
188      ClassMeta<?> sType = null;
189
190      aType = push2(attrName, o, eType);
191
192      if (aType == null)
193         return out.appendNull();
194
195      if (isOptional(aType)) {
196         o = getOptionalValue(o);
197         eType = getOptionalType(eType);
198         aType = getClassMetaForObject(o, object());
199      }
200
201      sType = aType;
202      String typeName = getBeanTypeName(this, eType, aType, pMeta);
203
204      var swap = aType.getSwap(this);
205      if (nn(swap)) {
206         o = swap(swap, o);
207         sType = swap.getSwapClassMeta(this);
208
209         if (sType.isObject())
210            sType = getClassMetaForObject(o);
211      }
212
213      if (o == null || (sType.isChar() && ((Character)o).charValue() == 0))
214         out.appendNull();
215      else if (sType.isBean())
216         serializeBeanMap(out, toBeanMap(o), typeName);
217      else if (sType.isMap()) {
218         if (o instanceof BeanMap o2)
219            serializeBeanMap(out, o2, typeName);
220         else
221            serializeMap(out, (Map)o, eType);
222      } else if (sType.isCollection()) {
223         serializeCollection(out, (Collection)o, eType);
224      } else if (sType.isByteArray()) {
225         out.appendBinary((byte[])o);
226      } else if (sType.isArray()) {
227         serializeCollection(out, toList(sType.inner(), o), eType);
228      } else if (sType.isBoolean()) {
229         out.appendBoolean((Boolean)o);
230      } else if (sType.isNumber()) {
231         out.appendNumber((Number)o);
232      } else if (sType.isUri() || (nn(pMeta) && pMeta.isUri())) {
233         out.appendString(resolveUri(o.toString()));
234      } else if (sType.isDate()) {
235         out.appendString(serializeDate((Date)o, sType));
236      } else if (sType.isCalendar()) {
237         out.appendString(serializeCalendar(o, sType));
238      } else if (sType.isTemporal()) {
239         out.appendString(serializeTemporal((TemporalAccessor)o, sType));
240      } else if (sType.isDuration()) {
241         appendDuration(out, (Duration)o);
242      } else if (sType.isPeriod()) {
243         out.appendString(serializePeriod((Period)o));
244      } else if (sType.isStreamable()) {
245         serializeCollection(out, toListFromStreamable(o, sType), eType);
246      } else if (sType.isReader()) {
247         pipe((Reader)o, out, SerializerSession::handleThrown);
248      } else if (sType.isInputStream()) {
249         pipe((InputStream)o, out, SerializerSession::handleThrown);
250      } else
251         out.appendString(toString(o));
252
253      pop();
254      return out;
255   }
256
257   private void serializeBeanMap(CborOutputStream out, BeanMap<?> m, String typeName) throws SerializeException {
258
259      Predicate<Object> checkNull = x -> isKeepNullProperties() || nn(x);
260
261      var values = new ArrayList<BeanPropertyValue>();
262
263      if (nn(typeName)) {
264         BeanPropertyMeta pm = m.getMeta().getTypeProperty();
265         values.add(new BeanPropertyValue(pm, pm.getName(), typeName, null));
266      }
267
268      m.forEachValue(checkNull, (pMeta, key, value, thrown) -> {
269         if (nn(thrown)) {
270            onBeanGetterException(pMeta, thrown);
271            return;
272         }
273         var p = new BeanPropertyValue(pMeta, key, value, null);
274
275         if ((! isKeepNullProperties()) && willRecurse(p)) {
276            return;
277         }
278
279         values.add(p);
280      });
281
282      out.startMap(values.size());
283
284      values.forEach(x -> {
285         BeanPropertyMeta pMeta = x.getMeta();
286         if (pMeta.canRead()) {
287            ClassMeta<?> cMeta = (ClassMeta<?>) x.getBeanInfo();
288            String key = x.getName();
289            Object value = x.getValue();
290            serializeAnything(out, key, null, null, null);
291            serializeAnything(out, value, cMeta, key, pMeta);
292         }
293      });
294   }
295
296   @SuppressWarnings({
297      "rawtypes",  // Raw types necessary for generic collection handling
298      "unchecked"  // Type erasure requires unchecked operations
299   })
300   private void serializeCollection(CborOutputStream out, Collection c, ClassMeta<?> type) throws SerializeException {
301      var elementType = type.getElementType();
302      List<Object> l = listOfSize(c.size());
303      c = sort(c);
304      l.addAll(c);
305      out.startArray(l.size());
306      l.forEach(x -> serializeAnything(out, x, elementType, "<iterator>", null));
307   }
308
309   @SuppressWarnings({
310      "rawtypes",  // Raw types necessary for generic map handling
311      "unchecked"  // Type erasure requires unchecked operations
312   })
313   private void serializeMap(CborOutputStream out, Map m, ClassMeta<?> type) throws SerializeException {
314
315      var keyType = type.getKeyType();
316      var valueType = type.getValueType();
317
318      m = sort(m);
319
320      List<SimpleMapEntry> entries = listOfSize(m.size());
321      m.forEach((k, v) -> entries.add(new SimpleMapEntry(k, v)));
322
323      out.startMap(entries.size());
324
325      entries.forEach(x -> {
326         Object value = x.value;
327         Object key = generalize(x.key, keyType);
328         serializeAnything(out, key, keyType, null, null);
329         serializeAnything(out, value, valueType, null, null);
330      });
331   }
332
333   private boolean willRecurse(BeanPropertyValue v) throws SerializeException {
334      var aType = push2(v.getName(), v.getValue(), (ClassMeta<?>) v.getBeanInfo());
335      if (nn(aType))
336         pop();
337      return aType == null;
338   }
339
340   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerSession */
341   protected void doSerialize(SerializerPipe out, Object o) throws IOException, SerializeException {
342      serializeAnything(getCborOutputStream(out), o, getExpectedRootType(o), "root", null);
343   }
344
345   private void appendDuration(CborOutputStream out, Duration value) {
346      var f = getDurationFormat();
347      var s = serializeDuration(value);
348      if (f == DurationFormat.NANOS || f == DurationFormat.MILLIS)
349         out.appendNumber(Long.parseLong(s));
350      else if (f == DurationFormat.SECONDS)
351         out.appendNumber(Double.parseDouble(s));
352      else
353         out.appendString(s);
354   }
355
356}
